calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Apr-17-2017 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Apr-17-2017 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Department 206 for Short Cause Trial/Prove Up.
Department 514, Judge: Stephen M. Murphy, Clerk: A. Mok. Proceedings reported by: Gordon F. Aiavao, CSR#11216.

John Fitzpatrick Vannucci, Esq., appearing for and with Plaintiff Evan Krow, sworn and examined.
No appearance by or on behalf of Defendants Fox Ortega Enterprises and Hector Ortega.
Default duly entered as to Defendant Fox Ortega Enterprises.

Plaintiff's Exhibits:
1-Premier Cru Open Orders spreadsheet (Marked ID/Admitted)
2-Plea Agreement, US District Court, Certified Copy, Case No. CR16-281JD (Marked ID/Admitted)
3-Certified copy of Secretary of State for Fox Ortega Enterprises E-P53250 and F469207 filed 11/21/2012 (Marked ID/Admitted)
4-Plaintiff Evan Krow's CCP 1987 Notice to Appear at Time of Trial. (Marked ID/Admitted)
5-Statement of Damages for Fox Ortega Enterprises and Hector Ortega. (Marked ID/Admitted)
Court returned all exhibits to Plaintiff.

After evidence, Court ordered the following Judgment entered in favor of Plaintiff Evan Krow and against Defendants Fox Ortega Enterprises and Hector Ortega as follows:
Principal $77,199.45
Pre-Judgment Interest $16,211.88
Attorney's Fees $0.00
Costs $550.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $143,961.33

Judgment signed in open court.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Feb-06-2017 Continued To Apr-17-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Off Calendar Dec-05-2016 Continued To Feb-06-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
